claim_support.reason: Several claims rely on truncated evidence or cite contradictory sources. Specifically, the full-year adjusted diluted EPS of $10.62 is not fully visible in the truncated evidence snippet [42a974cc] which cuts off at '$1...'. Additionally, the Q4 revenue claim of $15.4 billion cites news snippet [0b30d1af] which explicitly states $13.93 billion, creating a support conflict within the cited evidence pack.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Critical mislabeling of financial growth metrics. The report explicitly states 'Year-over-year growth rates' and 'year-over-year increase' in Financial Analysis Paragraphs 1 and 2, but the cited calculation objects ([ff2cdb57], [7dbb3699]) show comparison periods as previous quarters (Q1 for Q2, Q3 for Q4), indicating Sequential (QoQ) growth, not Year-over-Year. This misrepresentation affects the interpretation of performance trends.

citation_precision.reason: In Recent Developments Paragraph 1, the claim of Q4 revenue at $15.4 billion cites evidence chunk [0b30d1af], which explicitly states revenue was $13.93 billion. While other chunks support $15.4 billion, citing a contradictory source without qualification reduces precision.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates, financial periods (Q4/FY 2025), and report as-of date (2026-01-20) are consistent. No post-as-of claims or future dates used as historical facts were detected.

consistency.reason: Severe inconsistency between text descriptions and calculation logic. The text repeatedly refers to 'Year-over-year' growth (Financial Analysis Para 1 & 2), while the authoritative calculation objects provided for those paragraphs compute Sequential (QoQ) growth (e.g., comparing Q4 to Q3). This contradiction changes the investment interpretation of the company's growth trajectory.
